title: 2026 04 27 2319 Counsel Should I Take The Next 6 Months And Only Build On Iphone Ins
html:
What you're actually asking

Whether to shelve rankett (web/SaaS) for six months and run an iPhone-only sprint on the cluster (outpace, swipr, etc). The framing — "only build on iPhone instead of web" — is asking me to bless an exit from the agency-channel B2B2B bet you already pivoted into, back toward the consumer-iOS surface you already pivoted out of.

Past-you in favor

  • You already named native polish as the ceiling, not shipping. "the responsiveness and snappiness that we need from an Apple App Award winner is not there… benchmarking Outpace's tactile feel against the polish ceiling, not against shipping competitors" — 2026 03 04 outpace doc polish note (2026-03-04). You don't apply that bar to web work.
  • iMessage-native as a real differentiator, not a cosmetic choice. "the iMessage-native framing is the differentiator vs Strava — leveraging iOS-native social rails instead of building a separate app graph" — 2025 11 15 outpace imessage step tracker (2025-11-15). This wedge does not exist on web.
  • SwiftUI is the most-mentioned dev tool in the entire vault outside Xcode and Supabase. Adopted late 2024, "Carried straight through every subsequent project: Brotein → Outpace → Swipr → IRL Lore" — swiftui entity (2024-12-21 → 2026). Eighteen months of unbroken native commitment.
  • You literally treat half-year stretches as the natural unit of life-chapter. "The 'six months' framing is definitional — Yahir treats half-year stretches as the natural unit" — six month adventure creed (2024-11-28). The shape of the question is in your own writing.
  • Domain context as moat — and fitness was already the lens. "domain context is itself a moat for a solo founder, because it lets you build without doing customer-discovery from cold" — from fitness to software the brotein arc (2026-04-27). Outpace sits in that same domain; you have the moat.

Past-you against

  • Rankett is "all my energy and time and future banking right now" — your words, not mine. Memory framing surfaced in from fitness to software the brotein arc (2026-04-27). You wrote the dependency. You don't get to pretend it's a free swap.
  • The exact economics that killed Brotein still apply to Outpace. "A consumer fitness app monetizes at $5–$15/mo per user with high churn. The Rankett GTM bible sells at $998/seat/month to agencies… Same wedge, 60–600x the per-customer revenue" — from fitness to software the brotein arc (2026-04-27). A 6-month iPhone sprint puts you back on the wrong side of that ratio.
  • You already named the App Store as a distribution liability. "BroMenu is direct-to-consumer in the App Store — the most expensive distribution surface in software" — same synthesis (2026-04-27). The whitelabel/agency channel was the unlock. Six iPhone-only months means voluntarily walking back into the expensive channel.
  • Bridge income is not abstract anymore. "I just got mad at myself mentally for spending $5.50 on a blended Horchata. I'm seriously making it out the mud" — 2025 09 23 how im scraping by (2025-09-23). Rankett's $998/seat/mo is the bridge. A 6-month iOS sprint with no monetization model will not pay rent in month 7.
  • Market already gave you the verdict on the consumer-AI surface. "Peekaboo collision was the catalyst… The B2C-AEO door slammed shut. The next 8 weeks were the whitelabel-thesis articulation that became Rankett" — aeo rankett thesis arc canvas (2025-10-24). You didn't pivot for fun.

The strongest evidence against the path you're leaning toward

"the corpus does not contain a death certificate, but the absence is itself the answer. The pivot is real and the pivot was rational… (1) LTV ceiling. A consumer fitness app monetizes at $5–$15/mo per user with high churn. The Rankett GTM bible sells at $998/seat/month… 60–600x the per-customer revenue. (2) Distribution. BroMenu is direct-to-consumer in the App Store — the most expensive distribution surface in software. Rankett is sold through agencies only — leveraged distribution where the agency's existing client book becomes the funnel" — from fitness to software the brotein arc (2026-04-27, written yesterday). Sit with this. You wrote the post-mortem on consumer-iOS-as-primary 24 hours ago. The question you're asking me is whether to undo that pivot. The doubt powering the question — likely the founder-loneliness loop in 2026 01 13 rankett com ("Why aren't we clicking and feeling the fire with rankett. Is it because you don't believe in it, or because you are lacking and pussy") — is the real signal. The doubt is about conviction in Rankett, not about whether iOS would be more fun. Switching stack is the procrastination disguise.

You may have forgotten you wrote…

2024 12 21 todos (2024-12-21) — the original BroMenu PRD. This was a six-month iPhone-only sprint. SwiftUI + Windsurf + OpenAI + Supabase + Sign in with Apple, fitness domain, native consumer app, "avoid paying the apple developer fee," "Reduce API call costs by caching responses wherever possible." You ran the exact experiment you're proposing. It produced Brotein, the Supabase menu_items dataset, the 4am Wingstop/Chipotle scrape sprint — beautiful execution. And it hit the ceiling that forced the Rankett pivot. The 6-month iPhone-only sprint isn't a hypothetical; it's a completed experiment whose result is the channel you're now considering abandoning.
